title: Blanche apologises for Epstein files 'mistakes'

title: At his final PMQs, Starmer soaked up the love from all sides - and even some tenderness from Kemi
description: It wasn’t his performances on Wednesday lunchtimes that did for the ultimate mid-table PM – it was all the other stuff
content: Who would have thought it? Most of us would have put money on Kemi Badenoch failing to read the room for Keir Starmer’s last ever prime minister’s questions. Not a bit. From her opening tribute to Ann Widdecombe to her final gags, Kemi was the model ... [6775 chars]

title: Pete Hegseth says soldiers over age 30 to be screened for testosterone deficiency
description: US defense secretary unveils plan that will work to ensure service members have the ‘right testosterone levels’
content:
Pete Hegseth announced Wednesday that the Department of Defense will offer testosterone deficiency screening for soldiers 30 and older.

title: Burnham does not rule out wealth tax
description: The expected next PM says he may have to "ask for a little more" in tax and warns of "difficult" choices.
content:
Andy Burnham has not ruled out a wealth tax, suggesting his incoming government may have "to ask for a little more" tax at some point.

title: Wildfires in Ontario make Toronto air quality worst in world
description: Environment Canada has issued health warnings after sky over city turns yellow
content:
Smoke from more than 100 active wildfires in northern Ontario have made Toronto’s air quality the current worst in the world and caused yellow, smoky air in cities across the north-east US.
